picks.name: Booking Holdings Inc.
picks.thesis: BKNG is down 22% from its 52-week high while earnings grew 21%/yr — a sentiment-driven pullback, not fundamental deterioration. Quality looks intact (healthy margins, durable revenue, long-term uptrend), and it's now at or below fair value ($180.76 vs $186.41, medium confidence). Valued with DCF and Comps.

methods.name: DDM — dividend discount
methods.reason: Not meaningful: this is a growth-oriented company that reinvests and returns cash mainly via buybacks rather than dividends (yield 0.8%, payout 23%), so a dividend-only model understates it — DDM excluded

reconciliation.sentence: The methods land between $161.09 and $211.72 (a 31% spread). They broadly agree on direction but differ on magnitude — medium confidence.
